title: Sanctions for Non-Provision of Ticket/PTA for Repatriation of OFWs
content: If the employment agency fails to provide the ticket or Pre-Departure Allowance (PTA) within 48 hours from receipt of notice, the Administrator shall suspend the documentary processing of the agency or impose such sanctions as it may deem necessary.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
